name: GaugeFlow P5-D0.7 Multiscale Semigroup-Consistent Quotient Flow Map v1
scope: D0.7 phase 1 reconstructs D0.6 only because its archived runner did not retain a checkpoint; phase 2 changes only the registered training distribution and losses below. D0.5/D0.6 reports and source remain unchanged.

phase_1_diagnostics.baseline: deterministic D0.6 reconstruction with identical model, 64 sources, seeds, optimizer and 5000 steps; no checkpoint is persisted

literature.citation: Boffi, Albergo, Vanden-Eijnden, Flow map matching with stochastic interpolants, 2024
Song and Dhariwal, Improved Techniques for Training Consistency Models, 2023

phase_2_model.time_injection: unchanged D0.6 Fourier interval FiLM at every block

span_sampling.endpoint_rule: u=1; otherwise sample s uniformly in [0,1-delta] and set u=s+delta

phase_2_training.rollout_midpoint: v=u+delta_2 where delta_2 is independently sampled from the same bucket law and clipped to 1; if necessary sample u uniformly so u<v
phase_2_training.loss: equal-weight sum of energy-normalized L_direct, L_rollout, L_semi; gradients pass through both rollout maps

evaluation.teacher_forced_metric: mean direct analytic-state-to-endpoint quotient RMS over 33 grid times

d0_8_authorization: Only if D0.7 fails. Select exactly one based on phase-1 and D0.7 diagnostics: contractive/Lipschitz constraint for amplification >1, local/global map for long-span direct-map dominance, or EMA teacher self-distillation for largest semigroup defect. Write a new protocol/rationale before running.
